codeReview.summary: Reviewed the assigned worker handoff/transcript and commit diff. The implementation in commit 1e28e44 (explicit static Astro output plus Vercel build/output config) is consistent with the feature's Vercel-readiness intent, and no high-confidence user-visible correctness defects were found for the scoped cross-route behaviors (VAL-CROSS-001/002/003/006) based on the provided evidence.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Windows-specific guidance for keeping the local dev server alive during browser verification is still under-specified in shared worker guidance.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript skeleton for worker session d59159e2-c352-452c-8f8c-63688f1364aa shows repeated failed startup/healthcheck attempts (fire-and-forget npm dev start, curl/netstat checks) before switching to PowerShell Start-Process flow that produced a stable listener on port 4321; frontend-worker SKILL.md does not document this fallback explicitly.

summary: Pass. I reviewed the transcript skeleton, handoff, and commit diff for this feature and found no actionable blocking/non-blocking code defects in the scoped implementation; one shared-state skill-guidance gap was noted for Windows dev-server startup reliability.
